Real GDP — GDP = Consumption + Investment + Exports G&S - Imports G&S
Nominal GDP — GDP = Consumption + Investment + Exports G&S - Imports G&S
Consumption = Private Consumption plus Government Consumption
Investment = Private fixed capital formation + d(stocks) + public  investment
GNDI = GDP + Primary Income  + Secondary Income
BOP — Current Account = Balance of G&S + Primary Income + Secondary Income
Balance of Goods and Services = Exports of G&S - Imports of G&S
S-I — Savings = Private Savings + Government (public) Saving
Fiscal — Revenue = Taxes + Other Revenues + Grants+ Social contributions
Net primary lending = revenue - non-interest exp. - net acquisition of non-financial asset
Net lending = revenue - expense - net acquisition of non-finance. Assets
Monetary — NFA+NDA = Broad Money + Other items net
